name: Bondage Girl
short_description: This is a tight room escape game with binding elements. The player controls the bound heroine to search for the props, unlock the shackles, avoid the enemy and escape the chamber of secrets, and finally wins!
detailed_description:
This is a tight room escape game with binding elements. The player controls the bound heroine to search for the props, unlock the shackles, avoid the enemy and escape the chamber of secrets, and finally wins!
Game features:
·Story mode - control the heroine's customs clearance and plot.
·Logo mode - you can change the clothes, posture and shackles of the heroine in the logo scene.
·Collection - clothing, shackles need to be collected through the level of the game.
·Binding elements and various clothes
